sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79663" key="parogko/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρογκόομαι</orth> <sense id="n79663.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be slightly curved,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.238</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
